contacts.inviteFromContactsDesc: Fumana basebelisi ba MONO ho mabitso a mohala, 'me u romele likhokahano tsa memo ho bao e seng basebelisi.
contacts.idMin2: Ka kopo kenya bonyane litlhaku tse 2 tsa MONO ID.

settings.notifRequestCancelled: Kopo ea tumello ea tsebiso e hlakotsoe.
settings.notifRequestFailed: Kopo ea tumello ea tsebiso e hlolehile.
settings.dataClearConfirm:
Na u batla ho hlakola lintlha tsohle tsa lehae?
(Litlhophiso, rekoto ea puisano, joalo-joalo li tla hlakoloa)
settings.monoIdTaken: MONO ID e se e sebelisoa.
settings.deleteAccountConfirm:
Na u hlile u batla ho hlakola ak'haonte?
Lintlha tsohle li tla hlakoloa ka ho sa feleng 'me li ke ke tsa hlaphoheloa.
settings.deleteAccountFinal: Netefatso ea ho qetela: Na u hlile u batla ho hlakola ak'haonte?

guestJoin.subtitle: Molaetsa oa phetolelo ea nako ea nnete ea AI

installBanner.desc: Ha u eketsa skrineng sa lapeng, ho tla ba bonolo ho sebelisa.

inAppBlocker.title: Bula ka sebatli sa kantle
inAppBlocker.body1: Sebatli sena se khaoletsa khokahano ea mohala/phetolelo khafetsa.
inAppBlocker.body2: Tlanya konopo e ka tlase ho bula hape ka Safari kapa Chrome.
inAppBlocker.hint: Ka ho tobetsa ka holimo ka ho le letona ho KakaoTalk ··· → U ka bula ka sebatli se seng

global.title: Lefatše
